heading: Rural residents engaged in subsistence uses
label: 3121 Rural residents engaged in subsistence uses

children.heading: Access to subsistence resources
children.label: a Access to subsistence resources
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that rural residents engaged in subsistence uses shall have reasonable access to subsistence resources on the public lands.

children.heading: Use of snowmobiles, motorboats, or other means of surface transportation
children.label: b Use of snowmobiles, motorboats, or other means of surface transportation
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this Act or other law, the Secretary shall permit on the public lands appropriate use for subsistence purposes of snowmobiles, motorboats, and other means of surface transportation traditionally employed for such purposes by local residents, subject to reasonable regulation.
